One operating system for agentic customer experiences
Explore
Reach more customers wherever they are, whatever they’re on
Engage them on every channel, in every scenario – from our platform or yours
Try for free
Contact an expert

Two teams.
One obsession.
Performance through innovation
Discover more
Discover more
This was the first chapter.
THE NEXT 20 YEARS START NOW
Conversational solutions for every use case
Verticalized & AI use cases
Design customer journeys
Build any use case on messaging or voice channels for your industry e.g. finance, healthcare, retail, using AI and our conversational experience platform.
Explore
Composable CX modules
Create conversations that click
Enable dynamic two-way interactions for marketing and customer support through messaging or programmable voice.
Explore
Programmable Channels
Connect on any channel
Effortlessly deliver messages across all channels from a unified messaging platform using the most advanced channel APIs in the world.
Explore
Network and APIs
Secure and scale every interaction
Protect your customers and their data with authentication tools or simply build communication workflows on our secure, flexible CPaaS APIs, and the most powerful network in the world.
Explore
Build any use case or conversational scenario

Retail & eCommerce
Telecoms

Transportation
Travel
Send OTPs
Onboard new customers
Introduce new features
Activate services
Promote new offers
Engage inactive users
Authenticate users, boost security and build trust
Secure transactions and account logins with a user-friendly authentication experience. Ensure global and local compliance and protection against unauthorized access.
Contact us
Start strong to build loyalty with seamless onboarding
Streamline customer onboarding with efficient, secure processes that enhance user experience. Simplify account setup, ensure compliance, and establish lasting loyalty from the first interaction.
Contact us
Update customers on exciting new features and services
Increase customer lifetime value by making them the first to know about the latest innovations, features and financial products.
Contact us
Activate banking services with ease
Make activating services, applying for loans or creating accounts available at a click of a button over a secure messaging channel.
Contact us
Highlight exclusive offers to maximize customer value
Effectively promote new offers with targeted messages. Drive engagement, enhance customer satisfaction, and encourage adoption of products and services tailored to their financial needs.
Contact us
Reconnect and re-engage with inactive customers
Reignite customer interest with personalized messages that highlight tailored solutions and offers. Encourage inactive users to rediscover the value of your services and strengthen their relationship with your brand.
Contact us
Promote new products
Personalized offers
Back-in-stock alerts
Delivery notifications
Manage orders
Share loyalty points
Launch your latest products with impact
Reach your target audience instantly with product announcements and promotions. Drive excitement and boost sales with targeted omnichannel marketing campaigns.
Contact us
Delight customers with tailored offers
Send tailored promotions based on customer preferences and behavior. Increase customer engagement and loyalty with timely and relevant offers.
Contact us
Reclaim lost sales with smart cart recovery
Win back customers who abandon their carts with automated reminders and incentives. Recover lost revenue and improve conversion rates.
Contact us
Keep your customers informed and engaged
Notify customers as soon as their desired products are back in stock. Drive immediate sales and strengthen customer relationships.
Contact us
Empower your customers with self-service options
Enable customers to track, modify, and return orders easily through SMS, Email, Voice or chat apps. Improve customer satisfaction and reduce support costs.
Contact us
Reward your loyal customers
Send personalized loyalty point notifications and redemption reminders. Encourage repeat purchases and foster long-term customer relationships.
Contact us
Answer FAQs 24/7
Upsell and cross-sell with personalized offers
Make top-ups easy
Convert prepaid customers to postpaid
Improve dunning process
Promote app adoption
Provide instant support, anytime, anywhere
Automate customer support with simple and AI-powered chatbots. Resolve common queries instantly and reduce customer wait times.
Contact us
Boost revenue with targeted offers
Send personalized offers based on customer usage patterns and preferences. Increase average revenue per user (ARPU) and customer lifetime value (CLV).
Contact us
Simplify top-ups and boost customer satisfaction
Enable customers to top up their accounts easily. Improve customer experience and reduce churn.
Contact us
Drive postpaid conversions
Send personalized offers and incentives to convert prepaid customers to postpaid plans. Increase revenue and customer loyalty.
Contact us
Proactive reminders so customers don’t miss out
Send timely reminders for bill payments, plan expiration, and other important notifications. Reduce missed payments and improve customer satisfaction.
Contact us
Enhance customer engagement through mobile apps
Promote app adoption to provide customers with convenient access to account management, billing, and service features. Simplify customer interactions and reduce dependency on physical stores or call centers.
Contact us
Schedule appointments
Send test results
Interactive consultation
Patient Education
Symptom checker
Order prescriptions
Simplify appointment scheduling for better care
Streamline the scheduling process, reduce wait times, and enhance patient satisfaction with convenient and efficient access to healthcare services.
Contact us
Deliver critical test results instantly and securely
Send time-sensitive test results directly to patients’ mobile devices. Ensure timely patient care and reduce administrative burdens.
Contact us

We calculate the estimate based on the average price of a channel in the selected country. The exact price you’ll pay per message may vary based on the destination country, network and applicable discounts. When sending large campaigns, multiple networks may be used, depending on speed and availability.

SMS pricing
SMS offers a flexible pay-as-you-go pricing model, allowing you to only pay for what you use.
Achieve the highest SMS delivery rates worldwide using a reliable business texting service from Infobip.
Our business SMS service supports a variety of use cases, ensuring the highest delivery rates. It also includes industry-leading fraud protection systems, personalization features, and more.

hits.title: European communications startup Infobip raises $200M for over $1B valuation
Infobip's MCP Servers Enable Smarter AI Communication
You're not a senior engineer until you've worked on a legacy project (2023)
Communication Logs: Handling 250M SMS messages a day
The siren song of ChatGPT and junior devs that listen to it
The must-have content to include in your API documentation
Improving Docker deployment process across remote data centers

analysis.name: Infobip
analysis.tagline: Build meaningful customer relationships across any communication channel
analysis.value_proposition: Global omnichannel CPaaS and customer engagement platform delivering messaging, voice, agentic AI, and contact-center capabilities across 20+ channels.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises, telecoms, B2B platforms, and digital natives needing global multi-channel messaging, authentication, and AI-driven customer engagement at scale

differentiators: Global omnichannel breadth — 20+ programmable channels including regional messengers (KakaoTalk, LINE, Zalo, Viber)
Telecom-grade infrastructure with Anam Protect Firewall protecting 120+ operators
Native SMS Firewall for A2P billing enforcement and revenue leakage prevention
AgentOS agentic AI platform integrated across channels
Infobip MCP servers for AI-native integrations
Direct telecom carrier relationships and Networks APIs / CAMARA integration

recent_ships.what: Fuchsia release: Email deliverability center, Salesforce Service Cloud messaging, Billing Usage API, TikTok Business Messaging in Conversations, WhatsApp rich templates, PDF transcript export, SMTP delivery reports, Email DR in Europe, Domain vetting, RCS US Interactive Session billing, Authenticated SIP trunk, Generative TTS, new STT provider
Electric release: Apple Messages for Business, Analyze, Conversations and Inbox, RCS, Subscriptions, WhatsApp updates
Driftwood release: AgentOS, Broadcast, CPaaS X, Email, Infobip MCP servers, Platform, RCS, Voice/video, WhatsApp updates
Coral release: Analyze, Blocklist, Conversations, Email, Live Chat, Platform, RCS, WhatsApp updates
Aurora release: AI agents, Broadcast, Conversations, Email, RCS, WhatsApp updates
Yucatan release: Analyze, AI hub, Answers, Broadcast, Conversations, CPaaS X, Email, Live Chat, Messages API, Moments, RCS, WhatsApp updates

praised: Infobip's MCP Servers Enable Smarter AI Communication (HN post)
Handles 250M SMS messages a day at scale (HN technical post)

free_tier.limits: Free trial with sample credits via 'Try for free'; startup program available

pricing.notes: Pricing page does not display public tier prices — all pricing is usage-based per channel/country/volume and gated behind 'Contact us' / 'Try for free'. RCS US Interactive Session billing model recently added. Billing Usage API provides invoice-aligned cost data.

recent_hn.title: Twenty Year Old Unicorn Goes AI-First Without Mass AI Layoffs
